description: KNOWN-FAILING: Mandate signed with spec-canonical payload MANDATE:<agent_did>:<issuer_did>:<expires_at>:<capabilities_hash> is rejected by the implementation which uses MANDATE:<re-serialized-body>. Per SPEC §4.5 this should be ALLOW.
known_failing_reason: Implementation uses MANDATE:<re-serialized-body> as signing payload (SPEC Appendix A.1). The spec-canonical format MANDATE:<agent_did>:<issuer_did>:<expires_at>:<capabilities_hash> is not yet implemented.
